title: AIF is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: AIF is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!
